BuyOrder.title: BuyOrder
BuyOrder.description: Represents a user's buy order for USDT.

id.description: Unique identifier for the buy order.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the order.

network.description: The selected network for the USDT transaction (BEP20, TRC20, ERC20).

usdtAmount.description: The amount of USDT the user wants to buy.

inrAmount.description: The equivalent amount in INR for the USDT purchase.

usdtAddress.description: The user's USDT address to receive the purchased USDT.

paymentMode.description: The selected payment mode (Cash Deposit, UPI, IMPS, NEFT, RTGS).

paymentReceiptUrl.description: Data URL of the uploaded payment receipt (optional).

status.description: The status of the order (e.g., pending_payment, payment_processing, completed, failed, expired).

SellOrder.title: SellOrder
SellOrder.description: Represents a user's sell order for USDT.

id.description: Unique identifier for the sell order.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the order.

network.description: The selected network for the USDT transaction (BEP20, TRC20, ERC20).

usdtAmount.description: The amount of USDT the user wants to sell.

inrAmount.description: The equivalent amount in INR for the USDT sale.

paymentReceivingMode.description: The selected payment receiving mode (Cash Deposit, UPI, IMPS, RTGS, NEFT).

upiHolderName.description: The name of the UPI account holder (if UPI is selected).

upiId.description: The UPI ID (if UPI is selected).

bankName.description: The name of the bank for receiving payment (if not UPI).

accountNumber.description: The bank account number for receiving payment (if not UPI).

ifscCode.description: The IFSC code of the bank for receiving payment (if not UPI).

status.description: The status of the order (e.g., pending_deposit, payment_processing, completed, failed, expired).

ContactMessage.title: ContactMessage
ContactMessage.description: Represents a contact message submitted by a user.

id.description: Unique identifier for the contact message.

name.description: The name of the user submitting the message.

email.description: The email address of the user submitting the message.

description.description: A description of the user's problem or inquiry.

submittedAt.description: The date and time the message was submitted.

AppSettings.title: Application Settings
AppSettings.description: Stores global application settings managed by the admin.

definition.description: Stores all buy orders. Readable by admin, creatable by any signed-in user.
Stores all sell orders. Readable by admin, creatable by any signed-in user.
Stores contact messages submitted by users. Readable by admin, creatable by anyone.
Stores global application settings. This should be a single document, e.g., /settings/appSettings. Publicly readable, admin writable.
